feed.title: Bikramjeet Singh
feed.subtitle: Blogs by Bikramjeet Singh. I write about software development, programming languages, and more.

entry.title: Shipping Helm Charts to Air-Gapped Kubernetes Clusters

link.title: Shipping Helm Charts to Air-Gapped Kubernetes Clusters

entry.summary: Deploying Kubernetes applications to air-gapped environments requires shipping both Helm charts and their Docker images. Let's see how we can package and deploy Helm charts to air-gapped Kubernetes clusters.

entry.title: Installing containerized apps using rpms
entry.summary: Configuring and managing `docker` images in airgapped system can be challending. Let's see how we can ease IT Admin's job by letting them use what they have been using for years now.

entry.title: Installing containerized apps on airgapped systems

link.title: Installing containerized apps on airgapped systems

entry.summary: Shipping Docker images to an airgapped system can be challenging due to no internet connectivity. Let see how we can ship `docker` images to an airgapped system.

entry.title: Consistent Development environments using devcontainers
entry.summary: Leveraging `docker` containers for providing reusable, replicable and consistent development enviorment.

entry.title: Let's Balance the load Part 3 - L7

link.title: Let's Balance the load Part 3 - L7

entry.summary: At L7 level we use reverse proxies to expose our services to the clients and these reverse proxies forwards the traffic to the actual servers based on various load balancing algorithms.
